mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.*, u.permiss_type FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document e ON a.bus_id = e.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_doc_rel d ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document c ON c.rel_doc = a.bus_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document_user u ON a.bus_id = u.doc_id

SELECT DISTINCT a.*, u.permiss_type FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document e ON a.bus_id = e.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_doc_rel d ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document c ON c.rel_doc = a.bus_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document_user u ON a.bus_id = u.doc_id

SELECT DISTINCT a.*, u.permiss_type FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document e ON a.bus_id = e.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_doc_rel d ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document c ON c.rel_doc = a.bus_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document_user u ON a.bus_id = u.doc_id
ORDER BY a.doc_seq ASC ,a.create_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT d.del_date, d.recycle_id, a.* FROM doc_bs_recycle d LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document a ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document c ON d.doc_id = c.doc_id

SELECT DISTINCT d.del_date, d.recycle_id, a.* FROM doc_bs_recycle d LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document a ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document c ON d.doc_id = c.doc_id WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND d.recycle_id IN
#{item}

SELECT DISTINCT d.del_date, d.recycle_id, a.* FROM doc_bs_recycle d LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document a ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document c ON d.doc_id = c.doc_id WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 AND a.bus_id IN
#{item}

SELECT a.*, b.house_name AS houseIdStr, c.doc_name AS folderIdStr FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_sys_house b ON a.house_id = b.house_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document c ON a.parent_id = c.bus_id WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND b.is_deleted = 0 AND a.bus_id=#{busId}

SELECT DISTINCT a.*, b.permiss_type, b.is_deleted AS isPermissDeleted FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document_user b ON a.bus_id = b.doc_id WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.recycle_status = 0 AND a.doc_type = 0 AND a.type = 0 AND a.house_id = #{houseId} ORDER BY a.doc_seq ASC, a.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT a.* FROM doc_bs_document a LEFT JOIN doc_bs_tag_document e ON a.bus_id = e.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_doc_rel d ON a.bus_id = d.doc_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document c ON c.rel_doc = a.bus_id LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document_user u ON a.bus_id = u.doc_id

if.test: extendPageDTO.contains == true and extendPageDTO.suffixSize != 1 and extendPageDTO.dicExtraList !=null and extendPageDTO.dicExtraList.size() > 0

mapper.select: SELECT t.doc_id, LISTAGG(d.doc_name, '/') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY d.folder_level) AS folderName FROM doc_bs_document_tree t LEFT JOIN doc_bs_document d ON d.bus_id = t.father_id WHERE doc_id = #{folderId} GROUP BY t.doc_id
